case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGEHNY CASUALTY COMPANY

NOTICE OF MOTION TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR 90 DAYS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR SEP-09-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
